name: Dewald Visser
heroPosition: I build brands — and the businesses and systems behind them. Strategy, design and code under one roof.
aboutHeadline: A multidisciplinary founder who builds brands, runs the marketing that grows them, and ships the web experiences that carry them.
aboutBody: Director at clicklocal.co.za and a hands-on designer-developer across the full Adobe and front-end stack. I've launched e-commerce stores under pressure, built booking and automation systems, and run campaigns tied to real growth — equally at home owning the strategy and pushing the pixels.
education: National Senior Certificate — Hillcrest High School, 2013
